reason: Successfully navigated to the Gamut app, located and clicked the QA-20260708-164328-j12n agent, verified its status was idle, sent the message "Hello! What is 2+2?", waited for the response, and verified the agent correctly responded with "4".
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, displaying the Gamut application home page with the agent list in the sidebar.

Step 2 - Clicked on the "QA-20260708-164328-j12n" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page loaded successfully at URL /agents/qa-20260708-164328-j12n-3fgek3lgft, with agent configuration interface displayed.
Step 3 - Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Confirmed agent status is "idle" as shown in the header of the agent detail page.

Step 4 - Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully entered in the message input field and sent by clicking the Send button. Page navigated to session URL /agents/qa-20260708-164328-j12n-3fgek3lgft/sessions/8ccac32f-ce87-4448-9043-06c8e78508c6 with session title "Quick Math Question Session".
Step 5 - Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Response was received in 5 seconds (much faster than the 3-minute timeout). Agent status changed from "working" back to "idle" upon completion.

Step 6 - Verified the response mentions "4" and took a screenshot — Agent response correctly displays "4" as the answer to the math question "What is 2+2?". Screenshot taken showing the complete conversation with user message and agent response visible.
